judge_reason: Description B provides extensive, specific quoted text (crossed-out 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps, 'SECRET' stamps, a red stamped number, handwritten annotations) that is entirely absent from the very brief Description A, creating a fundamental contradiction on the presence and content of these visual elements.
original_image_tags: Aged, light-brown manila cover sheet for a file folder. Two punch holes are visible along the left edge.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned beige manila folder cover with three punched holes on the left, stamped “CONFIDENTIAL” at the top and bottom, three small “SECRET” stamps across the middle, and red/black catalog markings including “020249 30014,” “S 78-1(26),” and “P 615.”*
